ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot gently cradling a globe, emphasizing the care and attention given to the Earth, specifically focusing on the Asia-Australia region.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, reflecting a thoughtful and respectful approach. The robot’s lack of fingers will be addressed by using the overall arm position to suggest the globe is held carefully. Frame 1 will begin with both arms slightly raised and angled outward, as if preparing to receive the globe. Frame 2 shows both arms moving slightly inward and upward, creating a cradle-like shape to gently hold the globe. Frame 3 will show the arms holding the globe steady, with a slight inward tilt to focus on Asia-Australia. Frame 4 will show the robot gently returning the globe to a resting place.  Frame 5 will show the robot's arms returning to a resting position.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly, ready to embrace the world
arms move inward and upward, forming a gentle cradle
holding the world steady, a careful tilt to asia-australia
gently returning the globe to its resting place
arms return to a relaxed, resting position
